messages.cash.enable.player: Yoo, could you deliver your cash to the dead drop? Deliver after collecting ${0:F0}.
messages.cash.disable.player: The dead drops are not safe right now. I will meet you to collect the cash myself.
messages.products.enable.player: I will deposit products at the dead drop. Pick them up when you have fewer than {0:F0} pcs left.
messages.products.enable.dealer: Okay. I will pick them up soon!
messages.products.disable.player: We cannot use the dead drops for a while. I will meet you to bring new products.
messages.fire.confirm_body:
Ending the cooperation could make the dealer very angry.

They may become hostile in a future update.
messages.fire.player: I do not need your services anymore. You are out!
messages.fire.dealer: Fine. Get in touch if you need me again.
messages.negotiation.player_offer: We need to talk about your cut. How about {0:P0}?
messages.negotiation.same: That is the same amount I already get!
messages.negotiation.accepted: Okay, I am fine with that. We have a deal!
notifications.cash.no_space: Could not deliver cash to dead drop {0}. There is no space inside!
notifications.products.empty: Could not pick up products at dead drop {0}. There are no products inside!
